message:
fix: harden AutoClose and doctor against destroying protected beads

AutoClose: also exclude gt:role and gt:rig labels (role definition
and rig identity beads were being auto-closed and purged).

Doctor misclassified-wisp check: skip beads with any protection label
(gt:standing-orders, gt:keep, gt:role, gt:rig) before applying the
shouldBeWisp heuristic. Prevents doctor --fix from migrating
important beads to the wisps table and deleting them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -574,7 +574,7 @@ func AutoClose(db *sql.DB, dbName string, staleAge time.Duration, dryRun bool) (
 		AND i.issue_type != 'epic'
 		AND i.id NOT IN (
 			SELECT DISTINCT l.issue_id FROM `+"`%s`"+`.labels l
-			WHERE l.label IN ('gt:standing-orders', 'gt:keep')
+			WHERE l.label IN ('gt:standing-orders', 'gt:keep', 'gt:role', 'gt:rig')
 		)
 		AND i.id NOT IN (
 			SELECT DISTINCT d.issue_id FROM `+"`%s`"+`.dependencies d
